summary: Full end-to-end testing of Mahaveer Brothers laundry site. All 12 backend pytest cases passed (services, admin login, bookings CRUD, status update validation, 404/400 cases, stats, auth guard). Frontend home loaded with booking section, form submission POSTs /api/bookings AND opens correct wa.me/919695178760 deep link with pre-filled booking message. Floating WhatsApp btn present (data-testid=floating-whatsapp-btn). Admin login works (admin/admin123), redirects to /admin, dashboard shows Total/Pending/Delivered stats, logout returns to /admin/login, and /admin without token is correctly redirected to /admin/login.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py uses @app.on_event('shutdown') which is deprecated in FastAPI; consider lifespan handlers.
ADMIN_TOKEN is a static secret stored in env and returned to client; fine for MVP but consider JWT with expiry for production.
Admin token is logged/stored in localStorage (XSS risk); acceptable for MVP admin panel but flag for future hardening.
BookingForm re-opens WhatsApp even after POST failure - good UX but ensure toast clearly informs user booking wasn't saved.
seed_data_creation: Created and cleaned up TEST_ prefixed bookings during pytest run (all deleted at end of flow).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend tests live at /app/backend/tests/backend_test.py and can be rerun with `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Admin token is stored in localStorage under key 'mb_admin_token' (verify via page.evaluate). Floating WhatsApp btn uses data-testid='floating-whatsapp-btn'. WhatsApp URL format: https://wa.me/919695178760?text=<encoded message>.
